mapper.select: SELECT n_mooc.id, n_mooc.title, n_mooc.cover, n_mooc.mooc_description, n_mooc.data_scope, n_mooc.knowledge_base_id, n_mooc.permissions, creator_user.username as creator_username, n_mooc.is_delete, n_mooc.create_by, n_mooc.create_time, n_mooc.update_by, n_mooc.update_time FROM n_mooc LEFT JOIN sys_user as creator_user ON creator_user.id = n_mooc.create_by WHERE n_mooc.knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND n_mooc.is_delete = 0 ${params.knowledgeBaseScope}

SELECT n_mooc.id, n_mooc.title, n_mooc.cover, n_mooc.mooc_description, n_mooc.data_scope, n_mooc.knowledge_base_id, n_mooc.permissions as mooc_permission, creator_user.username as creator_username, n_mooc.is_delete, n_mooc.create_by, n_mooc.create_time, n_mooc.update_by, n_mooc.update_time FROM n_mooc LEFT JOIN sys_user as creator_user ON creator_user.id = n_mooc.create_by WHERE n_mooc.id = #{moocId} AND n_mooc.is_delete = 0;

SELECT n_mooc.id FROM n_user_knowledge_base INNER JOIN n_mooc ON n_mooc.knowledge_base_id = n_user_knowledge_base.knowledge_base_id WHERE n_user_knowledge_base.user_id = #{userId} AND n_mooc.is_delete = 0 AND (n_mooc.data_scope = 3 OR n_mooc.create_by = #{userId} OR (n_user_knowledge_base.permissions = 1 AND n_mooc.data_scope = 2));
